# Sideload packages

| File | What |
|------|------|
| `ELSD-0.1.0-m1-sideload.apk` | Versioned build for phones |
| `ELSD-latest-sideload.apk` | Same bits, stable filename for links |

**Install steps (for your person):** [`../docs/SHARE_INSTALL.md`](../docs/SHARE_INSTALL.md)

Rebuild: `.\scripts\package-sideload.ps1`

> These are **debug-signed** APKs for early testing — fine for girlfriends, friends, and OP9/OP12 lab phones. Not a Play Store release key.
